name: unity-mcp-slots
description: Releases the Unity MCP connection slot as soon as a Claude Code session stops using the Editor.

hooks.command: case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) s="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.ps1"; r="powershell -NoProfile -File" ;; *) s="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.sh"; r="bash" ;; esac; if [ -f "$s" ]; then $r "$s"; else echo "unity-mcp-slots: hook script not found at $s - slot not released" >&2; fi

case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) s="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.ps1"; r="powershell -NoProfile -File" ;; *) s="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.sh"; r="bash" ;; esac; if [ -f "$s" ]; then $r "$s"; else echo "unity-mcp-slots: hook script not found at $s - slot not released" >&2; fi
